summary: This standard defines a method for exporting a shielded note from one UTXO-based privacy protocol and importing it into another without publicly withdrawing and re-depositing the underlying asset. Similar to [EIP-7503](./eip-7503.md), sender creates a note in source pool bound to a destination-specific burn address. A destination protocol imports the note by verifying that the burn commitment is included in a recognized source pool root, that the source root is included in a trusted canonical tree, and that the imported output preserves the source note's asset context.
title: Shielded Note Teleportation
